title: Brighthollow
description: A skill based rpg style survival experience
body:
Brighthollow is an RPG-focused modpack. A robust skill system allows you to develop your character through progression-based skill levels, unlocking new passive abilities, enhancing existing traits, and granting access to powerful tools, advanced armor sets, and specialized weapons.

The world itself has been greatly expanded, featuring a wide variety of new biomes, immersive environments, and diverse wildlife. Dangerous new monsters roam the land, challenging your growth and testing your mastery of combat and survival. Scattered throughout the world are numerous unique structures, each offering opportunities for exploration, discovery, and reward.

Whether you choose to become a master warrior, a skilled artisan, or something entirely your own, this modpack empowers you to shape both your character and the world around you.

Go forth—and make the world the way you want it to be.
